name: Callia Bincal
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton female wearing a shirt with suspenders, green felt linens, and rough leather shoes - practical clothing for a settler.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: commoner, settler, refugee, daughter, wife, determined, pioneering
Role: Callia Bincal is a commoner taking refuge at Crestbridge Camp with her husband Aloys and her father Barthel. The family recently moved from High Rock after purchasing land in the Nibenay Basin with plans to build their own settlement. However, they are currently unable to settle due to trouble with nearby goblins. She carries only a small amount of gold and the clothes on her back.
Home Location Information: Initially at Crestbridge Camp. Later relocates to Cropsford once the goblin threat is resolved.
Daily Routine: At Crestbridge Camp, Callia sleeps from midnight to 6am and spends the rest of the day alternating between eating, sleeping, or wandering around on a random basis. Once the goblin war ends and she relocates to Cropsford, she busies herself around the settlement most of the day, only taking a break to sleep from 10pm to 6am. She initially sleeps in one of the tents before the first building is constructed, then in the bedroom of the first building afterward.
Personality - The Determined Settler: Callia is part of a pioneering family trying to establish a new life in Cyrodiil after leaving High Rock. Despite the current setback with goblins preventing them from fully settling their land, she and her family remain committed to their dream of building their own settlement in the Nibenay Basin.
author: Bethesda
